# app/forms.py
from flask_wtf import FlaskForm
from wtforms import StringField, FloatField, BooleanField, SubmitField, URLField
from wtforms.validators import DataRequired, NumberRange, URL, Optional

class ProductForm(FlaskForm):
    # еЯЇжЬђжГЕе†±
    name = StringField('еХЖеУБеРН', validators=[DataRequired()])
    brand = StringField('гГЦгГ©гГ≥гГЙ')
    purchase_price = FloatField('дїХеЕ•дЊ°ж†Љ', validators=[
        DataRequired(),
        NumberRange(min=0, message="0дї•дЄКгБЃжХ∞еА§гВТеЕ•еКЫгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБД")
    ])
    selling_price = FloatField('и≤©е£≤дЊ°ж†Љ', validators=[
        DataRequired(),
        NumberRange(min=0, message="0дї•дЄКгБЃжХ∞еА§гВТеЕ•еКЫгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБД")
    ])
    
    # зµМи≤їй†ЕзЫЃпЉИињљеК†йГ®еИЖпЉЙ
    transaction_fee = FloatField('еПЦеЉХжЙЛжХ∞жЦЩ', validators=[Optional()])
    shipping_cost = FloatField('йАБжЦЩгГїжҐ±еМЕи≤ї', validators=[Optional()])
    customs_duty = FloatField('йЦҐз®ОгГїиЉЄеЕ•жґИи≤їз®О', validators=[Optional()])
    procurement_fee = FloatField('и≤ЈдїШдї£и°МжЦЩ', validators=[Optional()])
    
    # URLйЦҐйА£
    supplier_url = URLField('дїХеЕ•еЕИURL', validators=[
        URL(message='жЬЙеКєгБ™URLгВТеЕ•еКЫгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБД', require_tld=False)
    ])
    image_url = URLField('зФїеГПURL', validators=[
        URL(message='жЬЙеКєгБ™URLгВТеЕ•еКЫгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБД', require_tld=False)
    ])
    
    # еЬ®еЇЂ
    stock_status = BooleanField('еЬ®еЇЂгБВгВК')
    
    submit = SubmitField('зЩїйМ≤/жЫіжЦ∞')

class ProfitFilterForm(FlaskForm):
    min_profit = FloatField('жЬАдљОеИ©зЫКй°Н', validators=[
        NumberRange(min=0, message="0дї•дЄКгБЃжХ∞еА§гВТеЕ•еКЫгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБД")
    ])
    submit = SubmitField('зµЮгВКиЊЉгБњ')

# ====================== END OF: exported_projects\project_export_y7xxp1v8\app\forms.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: exported_projects\project_export_y7xxp1v8\app\models.py ====================
# app/models.py
from app import db
from datetime import datetime

class Product(db.Model):
    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = db.Column(db.String(128), nullable=False)
    brand = db.Column(db.String(128))
    purchase_price = db.Column(db.Float, nullable=False)
    selling_price = db.Column(db.Float, nullable=False)
    supplier_url = db.Column(db.String(500))
    image_url = db.Column(db.String(500))
    stock_status = db.Column(db.Boolean, default=True)
    profit = db.Column(db.Float)
    listings = db.relationship('Listing', backref='product', lazy='dynamic')

    # зµМи≤їй†ЕзЫЃ
    transaction_fee = db.Column(db.Float, default=0.0)
    shipping_cost = db.Column(db.Float, default=0.0)
    customs_duty = db.Column(db.Float, default=0.0)
    procurement_fee = db.Column(db.Float, default=0.0)

    def calculate_profit(self, fee_rate=0.15):
        """NoneеѓЊз≠ЦжЄИгБњгБЃеИ©зЫКи®ИзЃЧеЉП"""
        calculated_profit = (
            (self.selling_price or 0) 
            - (self.purchase_price or 0)
            - ((self.selling_price or 0) * fee_rate)
            - (self.transaction_fee or 0)
            - (self.shipping_cost or 0)
            - (self.customs_duty or 0)
            - (self.procurement_fee or 0)
        )
        self.profit = calculated_profit
        return calculated_profit

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Product {self.name}>"

class Listing(db.Model):
    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
    platform = db.Column(db.String(50), nullable=False)
    fee_rate = db.Column(db.Float)
    product_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('product.id'))
    listing_date = db.Column(db.DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    is_active = db.Column(db.Boolean, default=True)

# ====================== END OF: exported_projects\project_export_y7xxp1v8\app\models.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: exported_projects\project_export_y7xxp1v8\app\utils\buyma_catalog_manager.py ====================
import os
import csv
import time
import random
import requests
import hashlib
import zipfile
import gspread
from datetime import datetime
from google.oauth2.service_account import Credentials
from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.common.action_chains import ActionChains
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
from selenium_stealth import stealth
from selenium.webdriver.chrome.options import Options
from selenium.webdriver.chrome.service import Service as ChromeService
from webdriver_manager.chrome import ChromeDriverManager
from selenium.common.exceptions import NoSuchElementException, TimeoutException

# --- и®≠еЃЪпЉИSDгВЂгГЉгГЙD:гГЙгГ©гВ§гГЦгГїгВєгГЧгГђгГГгГЙгВЈгГЉгГИIDи®≠еЃЪжЄИгБњпЉЙ---
CONFIG = {
    'profile_path': r"C:/Users/USER/AppData/Local/Google/Chrome/SeleniumProfile",
    'base_dir': 'D:/catalog_images',
    'screenshot_dir': 'D:/screenshots',
    'csv_path': 'D:/catalog_data.csv',
    'extracted_images_dir': 'D:/extracted_images',
    'google_credentials': 'D:/credentials.json',
    'spreadsheet_id': '1z9_lczAbnbsMYpAEslamfekEMrPQVIM1rfHqNbzze_Y',
    'worksheet_name': 'catalog_data',
    'safety': {
        'max_daily_requests': 500,
        'request_interval': (5, 10),
        'error_threshold': 10,
        'response_time_threshold': 8.0
    }
}

class BUYMACatalogManager:
    def __init__(self):
        self.driver = self._init_driver()
        self.request_count = 0
        self.error_count = 0
        self.downloaded_hashes = set()
        self.downloaded_catalog_ids = set()
        self.csv_records = []
        self._setup_directories()
        self._init_google_sheets()
        self.stop_flag = False

    def _setup_directories(self):
        directories = [
            CONFIG['screenshot_dir'],
            CONFIG['base_dir'],
            CONFIG['extracted_images_dir']
        ]
        for directory in directories:
            os.makedirs(directory, exist_ok=True)
            print(f"гГЗгВ£гГђгВѓгГИгГ™дљЬжИР: {directory}")

    def _init_google_sheets(self):
        try:
            scope = [
                'https://spreadsheets.google.com/feeds',
                'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive'
            ]
            creds = Credentials.from_service_account_file(
                CONFIG['google_credentials'], scopes=scope
            )
            self.gc = gspread.authorize(creds)
            self.worksheet = self.gc.open_by_key(CONFIG['spreadsheet_id']).worksheet(CONFIG['worksheet_name'])
            print("GoogleгВєгГЧгГђгГГгГЙгВЈгГЉгГИжО•зґЪжИРеКЯ")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"GoogleгВєгГЧгГђгГГгГЙгВЈгГЉгГИжО•зґЪгВ®гГ©гГЉ: {e}")
            self.gc = None
            self.worksheet = None

    def _init_driver(self):
        chrome_options = Options()
        chrome_options.add_argument(f"--user-data-dir={CONFIG['profile_path']}")
        chrome_options.add_argument("--no-sandbox")
        chrome_options.add_argument("--disable-dev-shm-usage")
        chrome_options.add_argument("--disable-blink-features=AutomationControlled")
        chrome_options.add_argument("--lang=ja")
        chrome_options.add_experimental_option("excludeSwitches", ["enable-automation"])
        chrome_options.add_argument("user-agent=Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/122.0.0.0 Safari/537.36")

        service = ChromeService(ChromeDriverManager().install())
        driver = webdriver.Chrome(service=service, options=chrome_options)
        
        stealth(driver,
            languages=["ja-JP", "ja"],
            vendor="Google Inc.",
            platform="Win32",
            webgl_vendor="Intel Inc.",
            renderer="Intel Iris OpenGL Engine",
            fix_hairline=True,
        )
        return driver

    def _human_like_delay(self):
        if self._check_response_time():
            delay = random.uniform(*CONFIG['safety']['request_interval']) * 1.5
        else:
            delay = random.uniform(*CONFIG['safety']['request_interval'])
        time.sleep(delay)

    def _check_response_time(self):
        try:
            navigation_start = self.driver.execute_script("return window.performance.timing.navigationStart")
            response_start = self.driver.execute_script("return window.performance.timing.responseStart")
            return (response_start - navigation_start) / 1000 > CONFIG['safety']['response_time_threshold']
        except Exception:
            return False

    def _force_close_modals(self):
        try:
            close_selectors = [
                ".catalogs-modal__close",
                ".modal-close",
                "//button[contains(text(), 'йЦЙгБШгВЛ')]",
                "//button[contains(text(), 'гВ≠гГ£гГ≥гВїгГЂ')]"
            ]
            for selector in close_selectors:
                try:
                    if selector.startswith("//"):
                        elements = self.driver.find_elements(By.XPATH, selector)
                    else:
                        elements = self.driver.find_elements(By.CSS_SELECTOR, selector)
                    for element in elements:
                        if element.is_displayed() and element.is_enabled():
                            element.click()
                            self._human_like_delay()
                            return True
                except Exception:
                    continue
            self.driver.execute_script("""
                document.querySelectorAll('.catalogs-modal-table, .modal, .modal-backdrop').forEach(e => e.remove());
            """)
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"гГҐгГЉгГАгГЂйЦЙгБШгВ®гГ©гГЉ: {str(e)[:30]}")
            return False

    def _extract_images_from_zip(self, zip_path, brand_name, catalog_id):
        try:
            extract_dir = os.path.join(CONFIG['extracted_images_dir'], brand_name, catalog_id)
            os.makedirs(extract_dir, exist_ok=True)
            
            with zipfile.ZipFile(zip_path, 'r') as zip_ref:
                zip_ref.extractall(extract_dir)
            
            image_files = []
            for root, dirs, files in os.walk(extract_dir):
                for file in files:
                    if file.lower().endswith(('.jpg', '.jpeg', '.png', '.gif', '.bmp')):
                        old_path = os.path.join(root, file)
                        new_filename = f"{brand_name}_{catalog_id}_{len(image_files)+1}_{file}"
                        new_path = os.path.join(extract_dir, new_filename)
                        os.rename(old_path, new_path)
                        image_files.append(new_path)
            
            return len(image_files), image_files
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"ZIPиІ£еЗНгВ®гГ©гГЉ: {e}")
            return 0, []

    def _download_file(self, url, brand_name, catalog_id):
        session = requests.Session()
        for c in self.driver.get_cookies():
            session.cookies.set(c['name'], c['value'])
        headers = {
            'Referer': self.driver.current_url,
            'User-Agent': self.driver.execute_script("return navigator.userAgent;")
        }
        
        response = session.get(url, headers=headers)
        if response.status_code == 200:
            file_hash = hashlib.md5(response.content).hexdigest()
            if catalog_id in self.downloaded_catalog_ids or file_hash in self.downloaded_hashes:
                return False, None
            
            save_dir = os.path.join(CONFIG['base_dir'], brand_name, catalog_id)
            os.makedirs(save_dir, exist_ok=True)
            zip_path = os.path.join(save_dir, f'catalog_{catalog_id}.zip')
            
            with open(zip_path, 'wb') as f:
                f.write(response.content)
            
            image_count, image_files = self._extract_images_from_zip(zip_path, brand_name, catalog_id)
            
            record = {
                'brand': brand_name,
                'catalog_id': catalog_id,
                'zip_path': zip_path,
                'extracted_dir': os.path.join(CONFIG['extracted_images_dir'], brand_name, catalog_id),
                'download_date': datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
                'image_count': image_count,
                'file_size': os.path.getsize(zip_path),
                'first_image_path': image_files[0] if image_files else '',
                'all_image_paths': '|'.join(image_files),
                'status': 'success'
            }
            
            self.csv_records.append(record)
            self.downloaded_hashes.add(file_hash)
            self.downloaded_catalog_ids.add(catalog_id)
            
            self._add_to_google_sheet(record)
            
            return True, record
        return False, None

    def _add_to_google_sheet(self, record):
        if self.worksheet:
            try:
                row_data = [
                    record['brand'],
                    record['catalog_id'],
                    record['zip_path'],
                    record['extracted_dir'],
                    record['download_date'],
                    record['image_count'],
                    record['file_size'],
                    record['first_image_path'],
                    record['all_image_paths'],
                    record['status']
                ]
                self.worksheet.append_row(row_data)
                print(f"GoogleгВєгГЧгГђгГГгГЙгВЈгГЉгГИгБЂињљеК†: {record['brand']} {record['catalog_id']}")
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"GoogleгВєгГЧгГђгГГгГЙгВЈгГЉгГИињљеК†гВ®гГ©гГЉ: {e}")

    def get_popular_brands(self, limit=50):
        return {

    def process_catalog(self, row, brand_name):
        try:
            self._force_close_modals()
            catalog_id = row.find_element(By.CSS_SELECTOR, 'span.catalogs-table__contents-id').text.strip()
            
            image_cell = WebDriverWait(row, 10).until(
                EC.presence_of_element_located((By.CSS_SELECTOR, '.catalogs-table__image-item > .catalogs-table__image'))
            )
            ActionChains(self.driver).move_to_element(image_cell).pause(0.5).click().perform()
            
            WebDriverWait(self.driver, 15).until(
                EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.CSS_SELECTOR, ".catalogs-modal-table"))
            )
            
            download_link = WebDriverWait(self.driver, 15).until(
                EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "a.catalogs-modal-table__link"))
            )
            download_url = download_link.get_attribute('href')
            
            success, record = self._download_file(download_url, brand_name, catalog_id)
            if success:
                print(f"жИРеКЯ: {brand_name} {catalog_id} (зФїеГП{record['image_count']}жЮЪ)")
            else:
                print(f"гВєгВ≠гГГгГЧ: {brand_name} {catalog_id}")
            
            self._force_close_modals()
            return True
            
        except Exception as e:
            timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
            self.driver.save_screenshot(os.path.join(CONFIG['screenshot_dir'], f'error_{timestamp}.png'))
            with open(os.path.join(CONFIG['screenshot_dir'], f'error_{timestamp}.html'), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                f.write(self.driver.page_source)
            print(f"гВ®гГ©гГЉзЩЇзФЯ: {str(e)[:100]}")
            return False

    def process_pagination(self, base_url, brand_name):
        page_num = 1
        while not self.stop_flag:
            try:
                self.driver.get(f"{base_url}&page={page_num}" if "?brand_id=" in base_url else f"{base_url}?page={page_num}")
                WebDriverWait(self.driver, 20).until(
                    EC.presence_of_element_located((By.CSS_SELECTOR, 'tr.catalogs-table__row'))
                )
                
                rows = self.driver.find_elements(By.CSS_SELECTOR, 'tr.catalogs-table__row')
                if not rows:
                    break
                    
                for row in rows:
                    if self.stop_flag:
                        return
                    self.process_catalog(row, brand_name)
                    self._human_like_delay()
                
                try:
                    next_btn = WebDriverWait(self.driver, 10).until(
                        EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.CSS_SELECTOR, 'a.pagination__next:not([disabled])'))
                    )
                    page_num += 1
                    self._human_like_delay()
                except (NoSuchElementException, TimeoutException):
                    print(f"{brand_name} гБЃжЬАзµВгГЪгГЉгВЄгБЂеИ∞йБФ")
                    break
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"гГЪгГЉгВЄеЗ¶зРЖгВ®гГ©гГЉпЉИ{brand_name}пЉЙ: {str(e)}")
                self.driver.save_screenshot(os.path.join(CONFIG['screenshot_dir'], f'pagination_error_{brand_name}.png'))
                break

    def _save_csv_summary(self):
        if not self.csv_records:
            return
        
        fieldnames = [
            'brand', 'catalog_id', 'zip_path', 'extracted_dir',
            'download_date', 'image_count', 'file_size',
            'first_image_path', 'all_image_paths', 'status'  # вЖР гБУгБУгБЂ'all_image_paths'гВТињљеК†
        ]
        
        with open(CONFIG['csv_path'], 'w', newline='', encoding='utf-8-sig') as f:
            writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=fieldnames)
            writer.writeheader()
            writer.writerows(self.csv_records)
        
        print(f"и©≥зі∞гГђгГЭгГЉгГИдњЭе≠Ш: {CONFIG['csv_path']}")
        
        total_downloads = len(self.csv_records)
        total_images = sum(record['image_count'] for record in self.csv_records)
        total_size_mb = sum(record['file_size'] for record in self.csv_records) / (1024 * 1024)
        
        summary = f"""
=== гГАгВ¶гГ≥гГ≠гГЉгГЙеЃМдЇЖгВµгГЮгГ™гГЉ ===
зЈПгГАгВ¶гГ≥гГ≠гГЉгГЙжХ∞: {total_downloads}дїґ
зЈПзФїеГПжХ∞: {total_images}жЮЪ
зЈПгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгВµгВ§гВЇ: {total_size_mb:.2f}MB
дњЭе≠ШеЕИ: {CONFIG['base_dir']}
иІ£еЗНзФїеГП: {CONFIG['extracted_images_dir']}
CSVи©≥зі∞: {CONFIG['csv_path']}
GoogleгВєгГЧгГђгГГгГЙгВЈгГЉгГИ: {'йА£жРЇжЄИгБњ' if self.worksheet else 'жЬ™жО•зґЪ'}
        """
        print(summary)

    def main_flow(self):
        try:
            if self.worksheet:
                try:
                    headers = ['Brand', 'Catalog_ID', 'ZIP_Path', 'Extracted_Dir', 
                             'Download_Date', 'Image_Count', 'File_Size_Bytes', 
                             'First_Image_Path', 'All_Image_Paths', 'Status']
                    self.worksheet.clear()
                    self.worksheet.append_row(headers)
                    print("GoogleгВєгГЧгГђгГГгГЙгВЈгГЉгГИгГШгГГгГАгГЉи®≠еЃЪеЃМдЇЖ")
                except Exception as e:
                    print(f"гГШгГГгГАгГЉи®≠еЃЪгВ®гГ©гГЉ: {e}")
            
            self.driver.get('https://www.buyma.com/login/')
            input("жЙЛеЛХгГ≠гВ∞гВ§гГ≥еЊМгАБEnterгВТжКЉгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБД...\nпЉИйАФдЄ≠гБІж≠ҐгВБгБЯгБДе†іеРИгБѓCtrl+CпЉЙ")

            popular_brands = self.get_popular_brands(30)
            print(f"еЗ¶зРЖеѓЊи±°гГЦгГ©гГ≥гГЙ: {list(popular_brands.values())}")
            
            for brand_id, brand_name in popular_brands.items():
                if self._safety_check():
                    break
                
                print(f"\n{brand_name}гБЃеЗ¶зРЖгВТйЦЛеІЛгБЧгБЊгБЩ...")
                catalog_url = f'https://www.buyma.com/my/sell/catalogs?brand_id={brand_id}'
                self.process_pagination(catalog_url, brand_name)

        except KeyboardInterrupt:
            print("\nгГ¶гГЉгВґгГЉи¶Бж±ВгБЂгВИгВКеБЬж≠ҐгБЧгБЊгБЧгБЯ")
            self.stop_flag = True
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"иЗіеСљзЪДгВ®гГ©гГЉ: {str(e)}")
        finally:
            self.cleanup()

    def _safety_check(self):
        self.request_count += 1
        if self.request_count >= CONFIG['safety']['max_daily_requests']:
            print("1жЧ•гБЃгГ™гВѓгВ®гВєгГИдЄКйЩРгБЂйБФгБЧгБЊгБЧгБЯ")
            return True
        if self.error_count >= CONFIG['safety']['error_threshold']:
            print("гВ®гГ©гГЉгБМе§ЪзЩЇгБЧгБЯгБЯгВБеБЬж≠ҐгБЧгБЊгБЩ")
            return True
        return False

    def cleanup(self):
        self._save_csv_summary()
        self.driver.quit()
        print("гГ™гВљгГЉгВєгВТиІ£жФЊгБЧгБЊгБЧгБЯ")

# --- еЃЯи°МйГ®еИЖ ---

    print("ењЕи¶БгБ™и®≠еЃЪ:")

# ==================== START OF: exported_projects\project_export_y7xxp1v8\app\utils\csv_handler.py ====================
# app/utils/csv_handler.py
import csv
from io import TextIOWrapper
from app import db # dbгВ™гГЦгВЄгВІгВѓгГИгВТгВ§гГ≥гГЭгГЉгГИ
from app.models import Product # ProductгГҐгГЗгГЂгВТгВ§гГ≥гГЭгГЉгГИ

def import_products_from_csv(file):
    # гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгВТUTF-8гБІйЦЛгБП
    csv_file = TextIOWrapper(file, encoding='utf-8')
    reader = csv.DictReader(csv_file)
    
    # жЧҐе≠ШгБЃгГЗгГЉгВњгВТгВѓгГ™гВҐгБЩгВЛгБЛгАБжЫіжЦ∞гБЩгВЛгБЛгБѓи¶Бж§Ьи®О
    # гБУгБУгБІгБѓеНШзіФгБЂињљеК†гБЩгВЛдЊЛ

    for row in reader:
        try:
            # CSVгБЃеИЧеРНгБ®ProductгГҐгГЗгГЂгБЃе±ЮжАІеРНгВТеРИгВПгБЫгВЛ
            # CSVгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгБМдї•дЄЛгБЃеИЧгВТжМБгБ§гБ®дїЃеЃЪ: 'еХЖеУБеРН', 'гГЦгГ©гГ≥гГЙ', 'дїХеЕ•дЊ°ж†Љ', 'и≤©е£≤дЊ°ж†Љ', 'дїХеЕ•еЕИURL', 'зФїеГПURL', 'еЬ®еЇЂзКґж≥Б'
            product = Product(
                name=row.get('еХЖеУБеРН', ''),
                brand=row.get('гГЦгГ©гГ≥гГЙ', ''),
                purchase_price=float(row.get('дїХеЕ•дЊ°ж†Љ', 0.0)),
                selling_price=float(row.get('и≤©е£≤дЊ°ж†Љ', 0.0)),
                supplier_url=row.get('дїХеЕ•еЕИURL', ''),
                image_url=row.get('зФїеГПURL', ''),
                stock_status=(row.get('еЬ®еЇЂзКґж≥Б', 'True').lower() == 'true') # 'True'/'False'жЦЗе≠ЧеИЧгВТзЬЯеБљеА§гБЂе§ЙжПЫ
            )
            # еИ©зЫКзОЗгВТи®ИзЃЧгБЧгБ¶и®≠еЃЪ
            product.profit_margin = product.calculate_profit()
            db.session.add(product)
        except ValueError as e:
            print(f"CSVгВ§гГ≥гГЭгГЉгГИгВ®гГ©гГЉ: жХ∞еА§е§ЙжПЫе§±жХЧ - {row}, гВ®гГ©гГЉ: {e}")
            # гВ®гГ©гГЉеЗ¶зРЖгАВгВєгВ≠гГГгГЧгБЩгВЛгБЛгАБгГ≠гВ∞гБЂи®ШйМ≤гБЩгВЛгБЛгБ™гБ©
            continue
        except KeyError as e:
            print(f"CSVгВ§гГ≥гГЭгГЉгГИгВ®гГ©гГЉ: ењЕй†ИеИЧгБМи¶ЛгБ§гБЛгВКгБЊгБЫгВУ - {e}, и°МгГЗгГЉгВњ: {row}")
            continue

    db.session.commit()
# ====================== END OF: exported_projects\project_export_y7xxp1v8\app\utils\csv_handler.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: exported_projects\project_export_y7xxp1v8\app\utils\existing_image_processor.py ====================
# вФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФА
#  existing_image_processor.py  вАХ иЙ≤гВЇгГђгГїе§±жХЧж§ЬзЯ•гГїиЗ™еЛХеБЬж≠ҐдїШгБНеЃМеЕ®зЙИ
# ----------------------------------------------------------------
#  ењЕи¶БгГ©гВ§гГЦгГ©гГ™
#     pip install rembg pillow opencv-python numpy pyoxipng
# ----------------------------------------------------------------
import io, sys, zipfile
from pathlib import Path

import cv2
import numpy as np
from PIL import Image
from rembg import remove, new_session

try:
    import pyoxipng           # Rust еЬІзЄЃгГ©гВ§гГЦгГ©гГ™
except ImportError:
    pyoxipng = None           # зД°гБПгБ¶гВВеЛХгБПпЉИPillow еЬІзЄЃгБЃгБњпЉЙ

# вФАвФА и®≠еЃЪ вФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФА
BASE_DIR        = r"D:\catalog_images"   # зФїеГП&ZIP гГЂгГЉгГИ
MAX_W           = 1200                  # ж®™еєЕгГ™гВµгВ§гВЇдЄКйЩР
MAX_BYTES       = 5_000_000             # 5 MB иґЕгБѓ JPEG гБЂгГХгВ©гГЉгГЂгГРгГГгВѓ
JPEG_QUAL       = 90                    # JPEG еУБи≥™

MAX_CONSEC_FAIL = 5                     # йА£зґЪе§±жХЧгБІеБЬж≠Ґ
MAX_TOTAL_FAIL  = 50                    # зіѓи®Ие§±жХЧгБІеБЬж≠Ґ
FAIL_SIZE_KB    = 15                    # 15 KB жЬ™жЇАгВТе§±жХЧгБ®гБњгБ™гБЩ
# вФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФА


def cleanup_previous_results(base: Path):
    """жЧІ *_bg.* гВТеЕ®еЙКйЩ§гБЧгБ¶еЖНеЗ¶зРЖ"""
    targets = [*base.rglob("*_bg.png"), *base.rglob("*_bg.jpg")]
    if targets:
        print(f"[CLEANUP] жЧІзµРжЮЬ {len(targets)} гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂеЙКйЩ§")
        for f in targets:
            f.unlink(missing_ok=True)


def unzip_all(base: Path):
    """ZIP иЗ™еЛХе±ХйЦЛ"""
    for z in base.rglob("*.zip"):
        dst = z.with_suffix("")
        if dst.exists():
            continue
        try:
            print(f"[UNZIP] {z.relative_to(base)}")
            with zipfile.ZipFile(z) as zf:
                zf.extractall(dst)
        except zipfile.BadZipFile:
            print(f"[WARN] е£КгВМгБЯ ZIP: {z}")


def optimize_png(rgba: np.ndarray, out_path: Path):
    """RGBA numpy вЖТ PNG-8 вЖТ (дїїжДП) oxipng еЬІзЄЃ"""
    img = Image.fromarray(rgba, mode="RGBA")

    if img.width > MAX_W:
        h = int(img.height * MAX_W / img.width)
        img = img.resize((MAX_W, h), Image.LANCZOS)

    img8 = img.quantize(method=Image.Quantize.FASTOCTREE,
                        dither=Image.Dither.NONE)

    buf = io.BytesIO()
    img8.save(buf, format="PNG", optimize=True)
    data = buf.getvalue()

    if pyoxipng:
        data = pyoxipng.optimize(data, level=4, strip=True)

    out_path.write_bytes(data)

    if out_path.stat().st_size > MAX_BYTES:
        raise ValueError("PNG > 5 MB")


def save_white_jpeg(rgba: np.ndarray, out_path: Path):
    """зЩљиГМжЩѓ JPEG дњЭе≠ШпЉИRGB вЖТ BGR е§ЙжПЫиЊЉгБњпЉЙ"""
    rgb   = rgba[:, :, :3]
    alpha = rgba[:, :, 3:] / 255.0
    white = np.full_like(rgb, 255)
    merged = (alpha * rgb + (1 - alpha) * white).astype(np.uint8)
    bgr = cv2.cvtColor(merged, cv2.COLOR_RGB2BGR)
    cv2.imwrite(str(out_path), bgr,
                [int(cv2.IMWRITE_JPEG_QUALITY), JPEG_QUAL])


def is_failure(file: Path, rgba: np.ndarray) -> bool:
    """ж•µзЂѓгБЂе∞ПгБХгБД or гВҐгГЂгГХгВ°еЕ®еРМеА§гБ™гВЙе§±жХЧ"""
    if file.stat().st_size <= FAIL_SIZE_KB * 1024:
        return True
    a = rgba[:, :, 3]
    return a.min() == a.max()


def process_single(bgr: np.ndarray, png_out: Path, jpg_out: Path):
    """иЙ≤з©ЇйЦУгВТзµ±дЄАгБЧгБ¶ 1 жЮЪеЗ¶зРЖ"""
    rgb = cv2.cvtColor(bgr, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB)
    rgba = np.array(remove(Image.fromarray(rgb)))  # RGBвЖТRGBA
    try:
        optimize_png(rgba, png_out)
        return png_out, "PNG", rgba
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"[WARN] {e} вЖТ JPEG дњЭе≠Ш")
        save_white_jpeg(rgba, jpg_out)
        return jpg_out, "JPG", rgba


def process_images(base_dir: str = BASE_DIR):
    base = Path(base_dir)

    print("[WARMUP] rembg гГҐгГЗгГЂеИЭжЬЯеМЦпЉИеИЭеЫЮгБЃгБњжХ∞еНБзІТпЉЙ")
    new_session("u2net")
    print("[WARMUP] OK\n")

    cleanup_previous_results(base)
    unzip_all(base)

    files = [*base.rglob("*.jpg"), *base.rglob("*.jpeg")]
    print(f"[INFO] еЗ¶зРЖеѓЊи±° JPEG: {len(files)} жЮЪ")

    consec_fail = total_fail = 0

    for idx, p in enumerate(files, 1):
        png_out = p.parent / f"{p.stem}_bg.png"
        jpg_out = p.parent / f"{p.stem}_bg.jpg"

        bgr = cv2.imread(str(p))
        if bgr is None:
            print(f"[SKIP] и™≠иЊЉе§±жХЧ: {p}")
            continue

        try:
            out_file, kind, rgba = process_single(bgr, png_out, jpg_out)
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[ERR] {p.name} вЖТ {e}")
            consec_fail += 1; total_fail += 1
            continue

        kb = out_file.stat().st_size // 1024
        print(f"[{idx}] {kind} {out_file.name} {kb} KB")

        if is_failure(out_file, rgba):
            print(f"[FAIL] {out_file.name} гВТзХ∞еЄЄж§ЬзЯ•")
            consec_fail += 1; total_fail += 1
        else:
            consec_fail = 0

        if consec_fail >= MAX_CONSEC_FAIL:
            print(f"[ABORT] йА£зґЪ {consec_fail} еЫЮе§±жХЧ вЖТ еБЬж≠Ґ")
            sys.exit(1)
        if total_fail >= MAX_TOTAL_FAIL:
            print(f"[ABORT] зіѓи®И {total_fail} дїґе§±жХЧ вЖТ еБЬж≠Ґ")
            sys.exit(1)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    process_images()

# ====================== END OF: exported_projects\project_export_y7xxp1v8\app\utils\existing_image_processor.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: exported_projects\project_export_y7xxp1v8\app\utils\generate_descriptions.py ====================
import os
import requests
import csv
import time
import random
from dotenv import load_dotenv
from datetime import datetime

# зТ∞еҐГе§ЙжХ∞гБЃи™≠гБњиЊЉгБњ
load_dotenv()

class BUYMADescriptionGenerator:
    def __init__(self):
        self.api_key = os.getenv("PERPLEXITY_API_KEY")
        self.endpoint = "https://api.perplexity.ai/chat/completions"
        self.headers = {
            "Authorization": f"Bearer {self.api_key}",
            "Content-Type": "application/json",
            "User-Agent": "BUYMA-Auto-Desc/3.0"
        }
        self.model = "sonar-pro"  # жЬАжЦ∞жЬЙеКєгГҐгГЗгГЂеРН

    def _create_log(self, message, log_type="error"):
        log_dir = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), "logs")
        os.makedirs(log_dir, exist_ok=True)
        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
        filename = f"{log_type}_{timestamp}.log"
        with open(os.path.join(log_dir, filename), "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            f.write(message)

    def _call_api(self, payload):
        try:
            response = requests.post(
                self.endpoint,
                headers=self.headers,
                json=payload,
                timeout=30
            )
            response.raise_for_status()
            return response.json()
        except requests.exceptions.HTTPError as e:
            error_msg = f"HTTP Error: {e.response.status_code}\n{e.response.text}"
            self._create_log(error_msg)
        except requests.exceptions.RequestException as e:
            error_msg = f"Request Failed: {str(e)}"
            self._create_log(error_msg)
        except Exception as e:
            error_msg = f"Unexpected Error: {str(e)}"
            self._create_log(error_msg)
        return None

    def generate_description(self, product_info):
        prompt = f"""
        гБВгБ™гБЯгБѓBUYMAе∞ВйЦАгБЃгГЧгГ≠гВ≥гГФгГЉгГ©гВ§гВњгГЉгБІгБЩгАВ
        дї•дЄЛгБЃжЭ°дїґгБІеХЖеУБи™ђжШОжЦЗгВТжЧ•жЬђи™ЮгБІдљЬжИРгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБДгАВ

        [и¶Бдїґ]
        1. 300-500жЦЗе≠Ч
        2. гГЦгГ©гГ≥гГЙеРНгБ®гВЂгГЖгВігГ™гВТиЗ™зДґгБЂйЕНзљЃ
        3. еХЖеУБгБЃзЙєеЊігВТ3зВєзЃЗжЭ°жЫЄгБН
        4. жДЯжГЕгБЂи®ігБИгВЛи°®зПЊпЉИдЊЛ: гАМдЄКи≥™гБ™гГђгВґгГЉгБЃйҐ®еРИгБДгАНпЉЙ
        5. жА•гБЛгБЧи°®зПЊгВДгАМдїКгБЩгБРгАНгБ™гБ©гБЃеЉЈгБДеЛІи™ШгБѓйБњгБСгВЛ
        6. йЗНи§Зи°®зПЊгВТйБњгБСгАБжГЕе†±гВТз∞°жљФгБЂжХізРЖ
        7. зФЯжіїгВЈгГЉгГ≥гВДдљњзФ®гВ§гГ°гГЉгВЄгВТзЫЫгВКиЊЉгВА
        8. и™≠гБњжЙЛгБЂиЗ™зДґгБЂжПРж°ИгБЩгВЛеП£и™њгБІдїХдЄКгБТгВЛ

        [еХЖеУБжГЕе†±]
        гГЦгГ©гГ≥гГЙ: {product_info.get('brand', '')}
        еХЖеУБеРН: {product_info.get('name', '')}
        гВЂгГЖгВігГ™: {product_info.get('category', '')}
        зЙєеЊі: {product_info.get('features', '')}
        зі†жЭР: {product_info.get('materials', '')}
        гВµгВ§гВЇ: {product_info.get('size', '')}
        гВЂгГ©гГЉ: {product_info.get('color', '')}
        еѓЊи±°е±§: {product_info.get('target', '')}
        дЊ°ж†ЉеЄѓ: {product_info.get('price_range', '')}
        """
        payload = {
            "model": self.model,
            "messages": [
                {"role": "system", "content": "гБВгБ™гБЯгБѓйЂШзіЪгГХгВ°гГГгВЈгГІгГ≥е∞ВйЦАгБЃгВ≥гГФгГЉгГ©гВ§гВњгГЉгБІгБЩгАВ"},
                {"role": "user", "content": prompt}
            ],
            "temperature": 0.7,
            "max_tokens": 1000
        }
        result = self._call_api(payload)
        return result['choices'][0]['message']['content'].strip() if result else None

    def batch_process(self, products, retry=3):
        results = []
        for idx, product in enumerate(products):
            attempt = 0
            while attempt < retry:
                try:
                    print(f"еЗ¶зРЖдЄ≠ ({idx+1}/{len(products)})")
                    desc = self.generate_description(product)
                    if desc:
                        results.append({**product, "description": desc})
                        break
                    else:
                        attempt += 1
                        time.sleep(2 ** attempt)
                except Exception as e:
                    print(f"гВ®гГ©гГЉ: {str(e)}")
                    attempt += 1
            time.sleep(random.uniform(1, 3))
        return results

if __name__ == "__main__":
    generator = BUYMADescriptionGenerator()
    sample_products = [
        {
            "brand": "PRADA",
            "name": "гВЈгГ≥гГХгВ©гГЛгГЉ гГИгГЉгГИгГРгГГгВ∞",
            "category": "гГИгГЉгГИгГРгГГгВ∞",
            "features": "иїљйЗПгГКгВ§гГ≠гГ≥зі†жЭРгАБе§ІеЃєйЗПеПОзіН",
            "materials": "гГКгВ§гГ≠гГ≥",
            "size": "W35cm x H25cm x D15cm",
            "color": "гГЦгГ©гГГгВѓ",
            "target": "20-30дї£е•≥жАІ",
            "price_range": "15-20дЄЗеЖЖ"
        }
    ]
    processed_data = generator.batch_process(sample_products)
    if processed_data:
        output_path = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), 'output.csv')
        with open(output_path, 'w', newline='', encoding='utf-8-sig') as f:
            writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=processed_data[0].keys())
            writer.writeheader()
            writer.writerows(processed_data)
        print(f"CSVгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгВТж≠£еЄЄгБЂеЗЇеКЫгБЧгБЊгБЧгБЯ: {output_path}")
    else:
        print("еЗ¶зРЖгБЂе§±жХЧгБЧгБЊгБЧгБЯгАВгГ≠гВ∞гВТзҐЇи™НгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБДгАВ")

# ====================== END OF: exported_projects\project_export_y7xxp1v8\app\utils\generate_descriptions.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: exported_projects\project_export_y7xxp1v8\app\utils\image_crawler.py ====================
# image_crawler.py вФА DeepLab v3 (MobileNetV3-ONNX зЙИ)
# дЊЭе≠Ш: torch torchvision onnx opencv-python numpy icrawler requests
# ------------------------------------------------------------
from __future__ import annotations
import cv2, numpy as np, requests
from icrawler.builtin import BingImageCrawler, GoogleImageCrawler
from pathlib import Path
from typing import List

# 1. гГҐгГЗгГЂгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂ
MODEL_DIR  = Path(__file__).parent / "models"
ONNX_FILE  = MODEL_DIR / "deeplabv3_mnv3.onnx"

# 2. гГАгВ¶гГ≥гГ≠гГЉгГЙеЗ¶зРЖгБѓеїГж≠ҐпЉИгГ≠гГЉгВЂгГЂгБЂзД°гБСгВМгБ∞жШОз§ЇгВ®гГ©гГЉпЉЙ
def ensure_model() -> None:
    if ONNX_FILE.exists():
        print("вЬУ DeepLab ONNX гГҐгГЗгГЂгБѓжЧҐгБЂе≠ШеЬ®гБЧгБЊгБЩ")
        return
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        f"{ONNX_FILE.name} гБМгБВгВКгБЊгБЫгВУгАВ\n"
        "1) app/utils/models гБІ make_deeplab_onnx.py гВТеЃЯи°МгБЧгБ¶зФЯжИРгБЩгВЛ\n"
        "2) зФЯжИРгБЧгБЯ deeplabv3_mnv3.onnx гВТ models гГХгВ©гГЂгГАгБЂзљЃгБДгБ¶еЖНеЃЯи°МгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБД"
    )

# 3. жЈ±еЇ¶е≠¶зњТгВїгВ∞гГ°гГ≥гГЖгГЉгВЈгГІгГ≥
class DeepLabSeg:
    def __init__(self, onnx: Path, use_cuda=False):
        self.net = cv2.dnn.readNetFromONNX(str(onnx))
        backend = cv2.dnn.DNN_BACKEND_CUDA if use_cuda else cv2.dnn.DNN_BACKEND_OPENCV
        target  = cv2.dnn.DNN_TARGET_CUDA  if use_cuda else cv2.dnn.DNN_TARGET_CPU
        self.net.setPreferableBackend(backend)
        self.net.setPreferableTarget(target)

    def remove_bg(self, img: np.ndarray, blur=5) -> np.ndarray:
        h, w = img.shape[:2]
        blob = cv2.dnn.blobFromImage(img, 1/127.5, (513, 513), (127.5,)*3, swapRB=True)
        self.net.setInput(blob)
        mask = self.net.forward()[0].argmax(0).astype(np.uint8)
        mask = cv2.resize(mask, (w, h), cv2.INTER_NEAREST)
        fg_mask = cv2.medianBlur(mask*255, blur) if blur else mask*255
        fg = cv2.bitwise_and(img, img, mask=fg_mask)
        return np.where(fg_mask[..., None] == 255, fg, 255)

# 4. зФїеГПж§ЬзіҐпЉЛиГМжЩѓйЩ§еОї
def crawl_and_remove_bg(keyword: str, max_num=30,
                        engines: List[str] | None = None,
                        use_cuda=False) -> Path:
    engines = engines or ["bing", "google"]
    out_dir = Path(__file__).parent / "images" / keyword.replace(" ", "_")
    out_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    if "bing" in engines:
        BingImageCrawler(storage={"root_dir": str(out_dir)}).crawl(keyword, max_num)
    if "google" in engines:
        GoogleImageCrawler(storage={"root_dir": str(out_dir)}).crawl(keyword, max_num)

    ensure_model()
    seg = DeepLabSeg(ONNX_FILE, use_cuda)

    for p in out_dir.glob("*.jpg"):
        try:
            img = cv2.imread(str(p))
            out_path = p.with_stem(p.stem + "_bg").with_suffix(".png")
            cv2.imwrite(str(out_path), seg.remove_bg(img))
            print("вЬУ", p.name)
        except Exception as e:
            print("√Ч", p.name, e)
    return out_dir

def crawl_images(keyword, max_num=50, engines=None):
    return crawl_and_remove_bg(keyword, max_num, engines or ["bing", "google"])

# 5. CLI
if __name__ == "__main__":
    kw = input("ж§ЬзіҐгВ≠гГЉгГѓгГЉгГЙгВТеЕ•еКЫгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБДпЉЪ")
    print("еЃМдЇЖвЖТ", crawl_and_remove_bg(kw, 50, ["bing"]).resolve())

# ====================== END OF: exported_projects\project_export_y7xxp1v8\app\utils\image_crawler.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: healing_sandbox\src\agents\base_agent.py ====================
# ==============================================================================
# гГХгВ©гГЂгГА: src/agents
# гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂеРН: base_agent.py
# гГ°гГҐ: гБЩгБєгБ¶гБЃгВ®гГЉгВЄгВІгГ≥гГИгБМиЗ™иЇЂгБЃгВѓгГ©гВєеРНгВТеЖ†гБЧгБЯе∞ВзФ®гГ≠гВђгГЉгВТжМБгБ§гВИгБЖгБЂ
#      гВҐгГЉгВ≠гГЖгВѓгГБгГ£гВТгВҐгГГгГЧгВ∞гГђгГЉгГЙгАВ
# ==============================================================================
import json
import logging # гГ≠гВЃгГ≥гВ∞гВТгВ§гГ≥гГЭгГЉгГИ
from openai import OpenAI
import google.generativeai as genai

class BaseAgent:
    def __init__(self, api_key: str, model: str):
        # --- вШЕвШЕвШЕвШЕвШЕ гБУгБУгБЛгВЙгБМжЬАйЗНи¶БдњЃж≠£зВє вШЕвШЕвШЕвШЕвШЕ ---
        # иЗ™еИЖиЗ™иЇЂгБЃгВѓгГ©гВєеРНгВТгГ≠гВђгГЉеРНгБ®гБЧгБ¶гАБе∞ВзФ®гБЃгГ≠гВђгГЉгВ§гГ≥гВєгВњгГ≥гВєгВТеПЦеЊЧ
        self.logger = logging.getLogger(self.__class__.__name__)
        # --- вШЕвШЕвШЕвШЕвШЕ гБУгБУгБЊгБІ вШЕвШЕвШЕвШЕвШЕ ---

        self.model = model
        self.client = None
        self.provider = None

        if "gpt" in model.lower():
            if not api_key or api_key == "dummy_key":
                raise ValueError("GPTгГҐгГЗгГЂгВТдљњзФ®гБЩгВЛгБЂгБѓгАБжЬЙеКєгБ™OpenAI APIгВ≠гГЉгБМењЕи¶БгБІгБЩгАВ")
            self.client = OpenAI(api_key=api_key)
            self.provider = "openai"
            self.logger.info(f"OpenAI client initialized for model: {self.model}")

        elif "gemini" in model.lower():
            if not api_key or api_key == "dummy_key":
                raise ValueError("GeminiгГҐгГЗгГЂгВТдљњзФ®гБЩгВЛгБЂгБѓгАБжЬЙеКєгБ™Google APIгВ≠гГЉгБМењЕи¶БгБІгБЩгАВ")
            genai.configure(api_key=api_key)
            self.client = genai.GenerativeModel(model)
            self.provider = "google"
            self.logger.info(f"Google Gemini client initialized for model: {self.model}")

        elif "dummy" in model.lower():
            self.provider = "dummy"
            self.logger.info("BaseAgent initialized in DUMMY mode for testing. No API client will be used.")
        
        else:
            raise ValueError(f"Unsupported or unknown model specified: {self.model}. Must contain 'gpt', 'gemini', or 'dummy'.")

    def _call_llm(self, prompt: str, system_prompt: str, temperature: float = 0.1, as_json: bool = False) -> str:
        """
        гГЧгГ≠гГРгВ§гГАгГЉгБЂењЬгБШгБ¶йБ©еИЗгБ™LLMеСЉгБ≥еЗЇгБЧгГ°гВљгГГгГЙгВТжМѓгВКеИЖгБСгВЛгАВ
        """
        self.logger.debug(f"Calling LLM. Provider: {self.provider}, JSON mode: {as_json}")
        if self.provider == "openai":
            return self._call_openai(prompt, system_prompt, temperature, as_json)
        elif self.provider == "google":
            return self._call_gemini(prompt, system_prompt, temperature, as_json)
        elif self.provider == "dummy":
            self.logger.warning("LLM call attempted in DUMMY mode. Returning empty string.")
            return json.dumps({"response": "dummy response"}) if as_json else "dummy response"
        else:
            self.logger.error(f"LLM provider '{self.provider}' is not implemented.")
            raise NotImplementedError(f"LLM provider '{self.provider}' is not implemented.")

    def _call_openai(self, prompt: str, system_prompt: str, temperature: float, as_json: bool) -> str:
        # (еЃЯи£ЕгБѓе§ЙжЫігБ™гБЧ)
        messages = [
            {"role": "system", "content": system_prompt},
            {"role": "user", "content": prompt}
        ]
        response_format = {"type": "json_object"} if as_json else {"type": "text"}
        
        response = self.client.chat.completions.create(
            model=self.model,
            messages=messages,
            temperature=temperature,
            response_format=response_format
        )
        return response.choices[0].message.content.strip()

    def _call_gemini(self, prompt: str, system_prompt: str, temperature: float, as_json: bool) -> str:
        # (еЃЯи£ЕгБѓе§ЙжЫігБ™гБЧ)
        generation_config = genai.types.GenerationConfig(
            temperature=temperature,
            response_mime_type="application/json" if as_json else "text/plain"
        )
        full_prompt = f"{system_prompt}\\n\\n---\\n\\n{prompt}"
        
        response = self.client.generate_content(
            full_prompt,
            generation_config=generation_config
        )
        return response.text.strip()

# ====================== END OF: healing_sandbox\src\agents\base_agent.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: healing_sandbox\src\agents\debugger_agent.py ====================
# ==============================================================================
# гГХгВ©гГЂгГА: src/agents
# гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂеРН: debugger_agent.py
# гГ°гГҐ: FKBгБЃ'target'гГТгГ≥гГИгВТиІ£йЗИгБЧгАБгАМдњЃж≠£и®ИзФїгАНгВТињФгБЩеИЖжЮРеЃШгБЂгВҐгГГгГЧгВ∞гГђгГЉгГЙгАВ
#      гВ®гГ©гГЉгГ≠гВ∞гБ®гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгВ≥гГ≥гГЖгВ≠гВєгГИгВТеПЧгБСеПЦгВКгАБдњЃж≠£еѓЊи±°гБ®гГСгГГгГБгВТзЙєеЃЪгБЧгБЊгБЩгАВ
# ==============================================================================
import os
import json
import re
import difflib
import logging
from .base_agent import BaseAgent

class DebuggerAgent(BaseAgent):
    """
    гВ®гГ©гГЉгГ≠гВ∞гВТеИЖжЮРгБЧгАБFKBгБЃзЯ•и≠ШгБЂеЯЇгБ•гБДгБ¶гАБгБ©гБЃгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгБЂгБ©гБЃгВИгБЖгБ™дњЃж≠£гВТ
    йБ©зФ®гБЩгБєгБНгБЛгБ®гБДгБЖгАМдњЃж≠£и®ИзФїгАНгВТзЂЛж°ИгБЩгВЛеИЖжЮРеЃШгВ®гГЉгВЄгВІгГ≥гГИгАВ
    """
    def __init__(self, api_key: str, model: str, knowledge_base_path: str = "fkb_local.json"):
        super().__init__(api_key, model)
        self.knowledge_base_path = knowledge_base_path
        self.fkb = self._load_fkb()
        
        if self.fkb:
            print(f"[OK] DebuggerAgent initialized. {len(self.fkb)} known issues loaded from: {self.knowledge_base_path}")
        else:
            print(f"[WARNING] DebuggerAgent initialized with an EMPTY knowledge base. File not found or empty at: {self.knowledge_base_path}")

    def _load_fkb(self) -> list:
        """
        Failure Knowledge Base (FKB)гВТгГ≠гГЉгГЙгБЧгБЊгБЩгАВ
        гВµгГ≥гГЙгГЬгГГгВѓгВєеЃЯи°МгВТиАГжЕЃгБЧгАБгВЂгГђгГ≥гГИгГЗгВ£гГђгВѓгГИгГ™гБЛгВЙгБЃзЫЄеѓЊгГСгВєгБІж§ЬзіҐгБЧгБЊгБЩгАВ
        """
        try:
            path = self.knowledge_base_path
            if not os.path.isabs(path):
                path = os.path.join(os.getcwd(), self.knowledge_base_path)
            if not os.path.exists(path): return []
            with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f: return json.load(f)
        except (FileNotFoundError, json.JSONDecodeError) as e:
            logging.error(f"Failed to load FKB: {e}")
            return []

    def debug(self, error_log: str, files_context: dict) -> dict | None:
        """
        гВ®гГ©гГЉгГ≠гВ∞гВТеИЖжЮРгБЧгАБгГСгГГгГБгБ®гВњгГЉгВ≤гГГгГИгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгВТеРЂгВАгАМдњЃж≠£и®ИзФїгАНгВТињФгБЧгБЊгБЩгАВ

        Args:
            error_log (str): pytestгБ™гБ©гБЛгВЙеЗЇеКЫгБХгВМгБЯгВ®гГ©гГЉгГ≠гВ∞гАВ
            files_context (dict): дњЃж≠£еѓЊи±°гБ®гБ™гВКгБЖгВЛгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгБЃгГСгВєгВТж†ЉзіНгБЧгБЯиЊЮжЫЄгАВ
                                  дЊЛ: {"source_file": "/path/to/app.py", "test_file": "/path/to/test_app.py"}

        Returns:
            dict | None: дњЃж≠£и®ИзФїгБЃиЊЮжЫЄгАБгБЊгБЯгБѓиІ£ж±Їз≠ЦгБМи¶ЛгБ§гБЛгВЙгБ™гБДе†іеРИгБѓNoneгАВ
                         дЊЛ: {"patch": "...", "target": "test_file", "entry": {...}}
        """
        logging.info(f"Debugging error... (log size: {len(error_log)} chars)")

        for entry in self.fkb:
            if re.search(entry["error_signature"], error_log, re.DOTALL | re.IGNORECASE):
                logging.info(f"Found known issue: {entry['cause']}")
                
                # FKBгБЛгВЙдњЃж≠£еѓЊи±°гБЃгГТгГ≥гГИпЉИ"source_file" or "test_file"пЉЙгВТеПЦеЊЧ
                target_hint = entry.get("target", "source_file") # гГЗгГХгВ©гГЂгГИгБѓгВљгГЉгВєгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂ
                
                file_to_read_path = files_context.get(target_hint)
                if not file_to_read_path or not os.path.exists(file_to_read_path):
                    logging.error(f"Target file for reading not found in context: {target_hint}")
                    continue

                try:
                    with open(file_to_read_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                        original_code = f.read()
                    
                    modified_code = self._apply_solution_pattern(original_code, entry["solution_pattern"])

                    if modified_code and original_code != modified_code:
                        diff = self._create_diff(original_code, modified_code, file_to_read_path)
                        logging.info(f"Generated patch for '{target_hint}':\n{diff}")
                        # гАМдњЃж≠£и®ИзФїгАНгВТиЊЮжЫЄгБ®гБЧгБ¶ињФгБЩ
                        return {"patch": diff, "target": target_hint, "entry": entry}
                    else:
                        logging.warning(f"Solution pattern did not result in code changes for file: {file_to_read_path}")
                
                except Exception as e:
                    logging.error(f"Error applying solution for '{entry['cause']}': {e}", exc_info=True)
                
                # 1гБ§гБЃгГЂгГЉгГЂгБЂдЄАиЗігБЧгБЯгВЙгАБгБЭгБЃзµРжЮЬпЉИжИРеКЯгБІгВВе§±жХЧгБІгВВпЉЙгВТињФгБЧгБ¶зµВдЇЖ
                return None

        logging.warning("No known solution found in FKB for this error.")
        return None

    def _apply_solution_pattern(self, code: str, solution: dict) -> str | None:
        """FKBгБЃиІ£ж±Їз≠ЦгГСгВњгГЉгГ≥гБЂеЯЇгБ•гБНгАБгВ≥гГЉгГЙгВТдњЃж≠£гБЧгБЊгБЩгАВ"""
        solution_type = solution.get("type")
        if solution_type == "regex_replace":
            search_pattern = solution["search"]
            replace_template = solution["replace"]
            # FKBгБЃ$1, $2... гВТ re.subгБМиІ£йЗИгБІгБНгВЛ \\1, \\2... гБЂе§ЙжПЫ
            replace_template = re.sub(r'\$(\d)', r'\\\1', replace_template)
            return re.sub(search_pattern, replace_template, code, flags=re.DOTALL)
        elif solution_type == "add_import":
            import_statement = solution["import"]
            if import_statement not in code:
                return f"{import_statement}\n{code}"
            return code
        return None

    def _create_diff(self, original_code: str, modified_code: str, filename: str) -> str:
        """2гБ§гБЃгВ≥гГЉгГЙжЦЗе≠ЧеИЧгБЛгВЙunified diffељҐеЉПгБЃгГСгГГгГБгВТзФЯжИРгБЧгБЊгБЩгАВ"""
        diff = difflib.unified_diff(
            original_code.splitlines(keepends=True),
            modified_code.splitlines(keepends=True),
            fromfile=filename,
            tofile=filename,
        )
        return "".join(diff)

# ====================== END OF: healing_sandbox\src\agents\debugger_agent.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: healing_sandbox\src\agents\patch_applier.py ====================
# ==============================================================================
# гГХгВ©гГЂгГА: src/agents
# гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂеРН: patch_applier.py
# гГ°гГҐ: еЖЕйГ®гГ≠гВЄгГГгВѓгВТз∞°зі†еМЦгБЧгАБOSж®ЩжЇЦгБЃ`patch`гВ≥гГЮгГ≥гГЙгВТзЫіжО•еСЉгБ≥еЗЇгБЩгБУгБ®гБІ
#      дњ°й†ЉжАІгБ®е†ЕзЙҐжАІгВТеРСдЄКгБХгБЫгБЯжЬАзµВгГРгГЉгВЄгГІгГ≥гАВ
# ==============================================================================
import logging
import os
import shutil
import subprocess
import tempfile
import re

class PatchApplier:
    """
    'unified diff' ељҐеЉПгБЃгГСгГГгГБгВТгВљгГЉгВєгВ≥гГЉгГЙгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгБЂйБ©зФ®гБЩгВЛгБЯгВБгБЃгВѓгГ©гВєгАВ
    DebuggerAgentгБЂгВИгБ£гБ¶зФЯжИРгБХгВМгБЯгГСгГГгГБгВТиІ£йЗИгБЧгАБеѓЊи±°гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгВТеЃЙеЕ®гБЂжЫіжЦ∞гБЩгВЛгАВ
    """

    def apply(self, patch_str: str, target_file_path: str) -> bool:
        """
        жМЗеЃЪгБХгВМгБЯгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгБЂгГСгГГгГБгВТйБ©зФ®гБЧгБЊгБЩгАВ

        Args:
            patch_str (str): unified diffељҐеЉПгБЃгГСгГГгГБжЦЗе≠ЧеИЧгАВ
            target_file_path (str): гГСгГГгГБгВТйБ©зФ®гБЩгВЛгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгБЃгГСгВєгАВ

        Returns:
            bool: гГСгГГгГБгБЃйБ©зФ®гБМжИРеКЯгБЧгБЯе†іеРИгБѓTrueгАБе§±жХЧгБЧгБЯе†іеРИгБѓFalseгАВ
        """
        if not patch_str:
            logging.warning("Patch is empty. Nothing to apply.")
            return False

        if not os.path.exists(target_file_path):
            logging.error(f"Target file not found: {target_file_path}")
            return False

        # `patch` гВ≥гГЮгГ≥гГЙгГ©гВ§гГ≥гГДгГЉгГЂгБМеИ©зФ®еПѓиГљгБЛгГБгВІгГГгВѓ
        if shutil.which("patch"):
            logging.info("Found 'patch' command. Using the standard system tool for reliability.")
            return self._apply_with_patch_command(patch_str, target_file_path)
        else:
            logging.warning("'patch' command not found. Attempting to apply patch using a built-in Python method. This is less robust for complex patches but avoids external dependencies.")
            return self._apply_with_python_fallback(patch_str, target_file_path)

    def _apply_with_patch_command(self, patch_str: str, target_file_path: str) -> bool:
        """
        `patch` гВ≥гГЮгГ≥гГЙгВТдљњзФ®гБЧгБ¶гГСгГГгГБгВТйБ©зФ®гБЧгБЊгБЩгАВжЬАгВВдњ°й†ЉжАІгБЃйЂШгБДжЦєж≥ХгБІгБЩгАВ
        """
        try:
            # гГСгГГгГБжЦЗе≠ЧеИЧгВТдЄАжЩВгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгБЂжЫЄгБНиЊЉгВА
            with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile('w', delete=False, suffix='.patch', encoding='utf-8', newline='\n') as patch_file:
                patch_file.write(patch_str)
                patch_filename = patch_file.name

            # patchгВ≥гГЮгГ≥гГЙгВТеЃЯи°М
            result = subprocess.run(
                ['patch', '-u', target_file_path, '-i', patch_filename],
                capture_output=True, text=True, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'
            )

            # дЄАжЩВгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгВТеЙКйЩ§
            os.unlink(patch_filename)

            if result.returncode == 0:
                logging.info(f"Successfully applied patch to {target_file_path} using 'patch' command.")
                return True
            else:
                # гГСгГГгГБйБ©зФ®е§±жХЧжЩВгБЃгВ®гГ©гГЉгГ≠гВ∞гВТи©≥зі∞гБЂеЗЇеКЫ
                logging.error(f"Failed to apply patch using 'patch' command. Stderr:\n{result.stderr}")
                return False
        except Exception as e:
            logging.error(f"An error occurred while using 'patch' command: {e}", exc_info=True)
            return False

    def _apply_with_python_fallback(self, patch_str: str, target_file_path: str) -> bool:
        """
        `patch`гВ≥гГЮгГ≥гГЙгБМи¶ЛгБ§гБЛгВЙгБ™гБДе†іеРИгБЃгАБPythonгБЃгБњгБІгГСгГГгГБйБ©зФ®гВТи©¶гБњгВЛгГХгВ©гГЉгГЂгГРгГГгВѓгАВ
        """
        try:
            with open(target_file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                original_lines = f.readlines()

            patch_lines = patch_str.splitlines(True)
            patched_lines = []
            original_idx = 0
            patch_idx = 0

            # гГШгГГгГАгГЉгВТгВєгВ≠гГГгГЧ
            while patch_idx < len(patch_lines) and not patch_lines[patch_idx].startswith('@@'):
                patch_idx += 1

            if patch_idx >= len(patch_lines):
                logging.error("Patch does not contain any hunk headers ('@@').")
                return False

            # гГПгГ≥гВѓпЉИе§ЙжЫізЃЗжЙАпЉЙгВТеЗ¶зРЖ
            while patch_idx < len(patch_lines):
                if not patch_lines[patch_idx].startswith('@@'):
                    patch_idx += 1
                    continue
                
                hunk_header = patch_lines[patch_idx]
                match = re.match(r'@@ -(\d+)(?:,(\d+))? \+(\d+)(?:,(\d+))? @@', hunk_header)
                if not match:
                    logging.error(f"Could not parse hunk header: {hunk_header.strip()}")
                    return False
                
                old_start = int(match.group(1))
                
                # гГПгГ≥гВѓгБЃеЙНгБЃи°МгВТеЕГгБЃгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгБЛгВЙгВ≥гГФгГЉ
                patched_lines.extend(original_lines[original_idx : old_start - 1])
                original_idx = old_start - 1
                patch_idx += 1

                # гГПгГ≥гВѓеЖЕгБЃи°МгВТйБ©зФ®
                while patch_idx < len(patch_lines) and not patch_lines[patch_idx].startswith('@@'):
                    line = patch_lines[patch_idx]
                    if line.startswith('+'):
                        patched_lines.append(line[1:])
                    elif line.startswith('-'):
                        original_idx += 1 # еЕГгБЃгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгБЃи°МгВТгВєгВ≠гГГгГЧ
                    elif line.startswith(' '):
                        if original_idx < len(original_lines):
                            patched_lines.append(original_lines[original_idx])
                        else: # еЕГгБЃгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгБЂи°МгБМгБ™гБДе†іеРИгБѓгАБгГСгГГгГБгБЃгВ≥гГ≥гГЖгВ≠гВєгГИи°МгВТгБЭгБЃгБЊгБЊдљњгБЖ
                            patched_lines.append(line[1:])
                        original_idx += 1
                    patch_idx += 1
            
            # жЃЛгВКгБЃи°МгВТеЕГгБЃгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгБЛгВЙгВ≥гГФгГЉ
            patched_lines.extend(original_lines[original_idx:])

            # е§ЙжЫіеЊМгБЃеЖЕеЃєгВТгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгБЂжЫЄгБНжИїгБЩ
            with open(target_file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8', newline='') as f:
                f.writelines(patched_lines)

            return True
        except Exception as e:
            logging.error(f"Python fallback patch applicator failed: {e}", exc_info=True)
            return False

# ====================== END OF: healing_sandbox\src\agents\patch_applier.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: my-crm-app\app\__init__.py ====================
# ==============================================================================
# гГХгВ©гГЂгГА: my-crm-app/app
# гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂеРН: __init__.py
# гГ°гГҐ: гВҐгГЧгГ™гВ±гГЉгВЈгГІгГ≥гБЃењГиЗУйГ®гАВгГПгГЉгГЙгВ≥гГЉгГЙгБХгВМгБЯи®≠еЃЪгВТжОТйЩ§гБЧгАБ
#      config.pyгБЛгВЙгБЩгБєгБ¶гБЃи®≠еЃЪгВТи™≠гБњиЊЉгВАгВИгБЖгБЂдњЃж≠£гАВ
#      гБУгВМгБЂгВИгВКгАБи®≠еЃЪгБЃдЄАеЕГзЃ°зРЖгВҐгГЉгВ≠гГЖгВѓгГБгГ£гБМеЃМжИРгБЧгБЊгБЩгАВ
# ==============================================================================
import os
from flask import Flask
from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy

# --- вШЕвШЕвШЕ гБУгБУгБЛгВЙгБМжЬАйЗНи¶БдњЃж≠£зВє вШЕвШЕвШЕ ---
# 1. и¶™гГЗгВ£гГђгВѓгГИгГ™гБЂгБВгВЛconfig.pyгБЛгВЙConfigгВѓгГ©гВєгВТгВ§гГ≥гГЭгГЉгГИ
from config import Config
# --- вШЕвШЕвШЕ гБУгБУгБЊгБІ вШЕвШЕвШЕ ---

# SQLAlchemyгБЃгВ§гГ≥гВєгВњгГ≥гВєгВТдљЬжИР
db = SQLAlchemy()

def create_app(config_class=Config):
    """
    гВҐгГЧгГ™гВ±гГЉгВЈгГІгГ≥гГХгВ°гВѓгГИгГ™йЦҐжХ∞гАВ
    FlaskгВҐгГЧгГ™гВ±гГЉгВЈгГІгГ≥гБЃгВ§гГ≥гВєгВњгГ≥гВєгВТзФЯжИРгБЧгАБи®≠еЃЪгВТи™≠гБњиЊЉгБњгАБ
    жЛ°еЉµж©ЯиГљгБ®гГЦгГЂгГЉгГЧгГ™гГ≥гГИгВТеИЭжЬЯеМЦгБЧгБЊгБЩгАВ
    """
    app = Flask(__name__, instance_relative_config=True)

    # --- вШЕвШЕвШЕ гБУгБУгБЛгВЙгБМжЬАйЗНи¶БдњЃж≠£зВє вШЕвШЕвШЕ ---
    # 2. config.pyгБЃConfigгВѓгГ©гВєгБЛгВЙи®≠еЃЪгВТи™≠гБњиЊЉгВА
    app.config.from_object(config_class)
    # --- вШЕвШЕвШЕ гБУгБУгБЊгБІ вШЕвШЕвШЕ ---

    # instanceгГХгВ©гГЂгГАгБМе≠ШеЬ®гБЩгВЛгБУгБ®гВТзҐЇи™НпЉИDBгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгБ™гБ©гБМдњЭе≠ШгБХгВМгВЛпЉЙ
    try:
        os.makedirs(app.instance_path)
    except OSError:
        pass

    # жЛ°еЉµж©ЯиГљпЉИгГЗгГЉгВњгГЩгГЉгВєпЉЙгВТгВҐгГЧгГ™гВ±гГЉгВЈгГІгГ≥гБЂзЩїйМ≤
    db.init_app(app)

    # --- вШЕвШЕвШЕ гБУгБУгБЛгВЙгБМжЬАйЗНи¶БдњЃж≠£зВє вШЕвШЕвШЕ ---
    # 3. routes.pyгБІеЃЪзЊ©гБЧгБЯBlueprintгВТгВҐгГЧгГ™гВ±гГЉгВЈгГІгГ≥гБЂзЩїйМ≤
    from . import routes
    app.register_blueprint(routes.bp)
    # --- вШЕвШЕвШЕ гБУгБУгБЊгБІ вШЕвШЕвШЕ ---
    
    return app

# ====================== END OF: my-crm-app\app\__init__.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: src\history_manager.py ====================
# гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂеРН: history_manager.py
import json
import os
from datetime import datetime
from typing import List, Dict, Any

class HistoryManager:
    def __init__(self, history_dir="history", prefix="history_"):
        self.history_dir = history_dir
        self.prefix = prefix
        os.makedirs(history_dir, exist_ok=True)
        self.history_path = self._generate_new_path()
        self.state_history: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
        self.current_index: int = -1

    def _generate_new_path(self):
        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
        return os.path.join(self.history_dir, f"{self.prefix}{timestamp}.json")

    def add_state(self, state: Dict[str, Any]):
        # жЬ™жЭ•гБЃе±•ж≠ігВТеИЗгВКжН®гБ¶гБ¶гБЛгВЙињљеК†
        self.state_history = self.state_history[:self.current_index + 1]
        self.state_history.append(state)
        self.current_index += 1
        self.save_history()

    def rollback(self):
        if self.current_index > 0:
            self.current_index -= 1
            self.save_history()
            return self.state_history[self.current_index]
        else:
            print("Already at oldest state")
            return self.state_history[0] if self.state_history else None

    def get_current_state(self):
        if self.current_index >= 0:
            return self.state_history[self.current_index]
        return None

    def save_history(self):
        with open(self.history_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            json.dump({
                "history": self.state_history,
                "current_index": self.current_index
            }, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)

# ====================== END OF: src\history_manager.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: src\opencodeinterpreter_webui.py ====================
# рЯУБ гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂеРН: opencodeinterpreter_webui.py
# рЯУВ гГХгВ©гГЂгГАжІЛжИР: /src/opencodeinterpreter_webui.py
# рЯХ† зЫЃзЪД: Gradio UIгБЂгГ¶гГЛгГГгГИгГЖгВєгГИзФЯжИР + дњЃж≠£гВµгВ§гВѓгГЂ + гГЖгВєгГИдЄАжЛђеЃЯи°МгВТзµ±еРИ

import gradio as gr
import os
import logging
from dotenv import load_dotenv
from openai import OpenAI
from uuid import uuid4

# --- зЛђиЗ™гГҐгВЄгГ•гГЉгГЂ ---
from nexuscore.code_interpreter.sandbox_runner import run_and_repair, run_test_and_repair
from nexuscore.utils.diff_tools import generate_diff_report, score_code_improvement
from nexuscore.utils.test_generator import generate_unit_tests

# --- Whisper йЯ≥е£∞и™Ни≠ШзФ® ---
def process_audio(audio_file):
    try:
        if audio_file is None:
            raise gr.Warning("йМ≤йЯ≥гБМгВ≠гГ£гГ≥гВїгГЂгБХгВМгБЊгБЧгБЯгАВ")
        with open(audio_file, "rb") as f:
            transcript = client.audio.transcriptions.create(
                model="whisper-1",
                file=f,
                language="ja",
                response_format="text"
            )
        return transcript
    except gr.Warning as w:
        raise w
    except Exception as e:
        logging.error(f"йЯ≥е£∞еЗ¶зРЖгВ®гГ©гГЉ: {str(e)}")
        raise gr.Error(f"йЯ≥е£∞еЗ¶зРЖгВ®гГ©гГЉ: {e}")

# --- GradioгГ¶гГЉгГЖгВ£гГ™гГЖгВ£йЦҐжХ∞ ---
def update_uuid(dialog_info):
    new_uuid = str(uuid4())
    logging.info(f"allocating new uuid {new_uuid} for conversation...")
    return [new_uuid, dialog_info[1]]

def history_to_messages(history):
    messages = []
    for msg in history:
        if isinstance(msg, dict) and "role" in msg and "content" in msg:
            messages.append(msg)
        elif isinstance(msg, (list, tuple)) and len(msg) == 2:
            messages.append({"role": "user", "content": msg[0]})
            messages.append({"role": "assistant", "content": msg[1]})
    return messages

def bot(user_message, files, history, dialog_info, frontend_preview):
    try:
        if files is None:
            files = []
        file_info, file_content, file_types, frontend_preview_str = handle_uploaded_files(files)
        user_input = user_message
        if file_info:
            user_input += "\n" + file_info
        if file_content:
            user_input += f"\n[\u30d5\u30a1\u30a4\u30eb\u5185\u5bb9пЉИ4000\u6587\u5b57\u307e\u3067пЉЙ]\n{file_content[:4000]}"

        prev_messages = history if history and isinstance(history[0], dict) else history_to_messages(history)
        ai_response = "гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгБЊгБЯгБѓгГЖгВ≠гВєгГИгВТеПЧгБСеПЦгВКгБЊгБЧгБЯгАВ"

        chatbot_value = prev_messages + [
            {"role": "user", "content": user_message},
            {"role": "assistant", "content": ai_response}
        ]
        return chatbot_value, chatbot_value, dialog_info, frontend_preview_str

    except Exception as e:
        logging.error(f"bot error: {e}")
        raise gr.Error(f"гВ®гГ©гГЉ: {e}")

def reset_textbox():
    return gr.update(value="")

def clear_history(history, dialog_info):
    return [], [], update_uuid(dialog_info), ""

# --- гГ¶гГЛгГГгГИгГЖгВєгГИзФЯжИР ---
def generate_and_show_tests(code: str) -> str:
    try:
        return generate_unit_tests(code)
    except Exception as e:
        logging.error(f"гГ¶гГЛгГГгГИгГЖгВєгГИзФЯжИРе§±жХЧ: {e}")
        return f"гВ®гГ©гГЉ: {e}"

# --- Gradio UIжІЛжИР ---
def gradio_launch():
    with gr.Blocks() as demo:
        with gr.Tabs():
            # гВњгГЦ1: дњЃж≠£гГїгГЖгВєгГИ
            with gr.Tab("рЯЫ† дњЃж≠£гВµгВ§гВѓгГЂ"):
                code_input = gr.Textbox(label="рЯТ° еЕ•еКЫгВ≥гГЉгГЙпЉИгВ®гГ©гГЉгБВгВКеПѓпЉЙ", lines=10)
                btn_testgen = gr.Button("рЯІ™ гГ¶гГЛгГГгГИгГЖгВєгГИзФЯжИР")
                test_output = gr.Code(label="рЯУД зФЯжИРгБХгВМгБЯгГ¶гГЛгГГгГИгГЖгВєгГИ")
                btn_run_repair = gr.Button("рЯФБ дњЃж≠£гБЃгБњеЃЯи°М")
                btn_run_test_repair = gr.Button("рЯІ™ дњЃж≠£+\u30c6гВєгГИдЄАжЛђ")
                output_code = gr.Code(label="вЬЕ дњЃж≠£жЄИгБњгВ≥гГЉгГЙ or гГђгГЭгГЉгГИ")

                btn_testgen.click(fn=generate_and_show_tests, inputs=code_input, outputs=test_output)
                btn_run_repair.click(fn=run_and_repair, inputs=code_input, outputs=output_code)
                btn_run_test_repair.click(fn=run_test_and_repair, inputs=code_input, outputs=output_code)

            # гВњгГЦ2: гГБгГ£гГГгГИпЉЛгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂеИЖжЮР
            with gr.Tab("рЯТђ Chat + гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂеИЖжЮР"):
                chatbot = gr.Chatbot(label="OpenCodeInterpreter", height=600, type="messages")
                msg = gr.Textbox(placeholder="гГ°гГГгВїгГЉгВЄеЕ•еКЫ or йЯ≥е£∞йМ≤йЯ≥", scale=5)
                file_input = gr.File(file_types=[".py", ".txt", ".md", ".json", ".zip"], file_count="multiple")
                file_list = gr.Textbox(label="гВҐгГГгГЧгГ≠гГЉгГЙгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂдЄАи¶І", interactive=False, max_lines=10)
                audio_input = gr.Audio(sources="microphone", type="filepath", label="йЯ≥е£∞йМ≤йЯ≥")
                frontend_preview = gr.Textbox(label="гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂеЕИй†≠гГЧгГђгГУгГ•гГЉпЉИ100е≠ЧпЉЙ")
                submit = gr.Button("Submit")
                clear = gr.Button("Clear")
                download_btn = gr.DownloadButton("е±•ж≠ігГАгВ¶гГ≥гГ≠гГЉгГЙ")
                session_state = gr.State([])
                dialog_info = gr.State(["", 0])

                demo.load(update_uuid, dialog_info, dialog_info)
                file_input.change(file_list_display, inputs=file_input, outputs=file_list)
                audio_input.change(process_audio, inputs=audio_input, outputs=msg)
                submit.click(bot, [msg, file_input, session_state, dialog_info, frontend_preview], [chatbot, session_state, dialog_info, frontend_preview])
                clear.click(lambda h, d: ([], [], update_uuid(d), ""), [session_state, dialog_info], [chatbot, session_state, dialog_info, frontend_preview])
                download_btn.click(download_history, [session_state], download_btn)

        demo.queue(max_size=20)
        demo.launch(share=True, inbrowser=True)

# --- иµЈеЛХ ---
if __name__ == "__main__":
    logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO)
    load_dotenv()
    api_key = os.getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY")
    if not api_key:
        raise RuntimeError("OPENAI_API_KEY гБМжЬ™и®≠еЃЪгБІгБЩгАВ.envгВТзҐЇи™НгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБДгАВ")
    client = OpenAI(api_key=api_key)
    gradio_launch()

# ==================== START OF: src\realtime_whisper.py ====================
# гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂеРНдЊЛ: realtime_whisper.py
# ењЕи¶БгБ™гГ©гВ§гГЦгГ©гГ™: sounddevice, numpy, noisereduce, librosa, soundfile, openai, scipy
# гВ§гГ≥гВєгГИгГЉгГЂдЊЛ:
# pip install sounddevice numpy noisereduce librosa soundfile openai scipy

import sounddevice as sd
import numpy as np
import threading
import time
import noisereduce as nr
import librosa
import soundfile as sf
import tempfile
import openai
from scipy.io.wavfile import write
import os

# Whisper APIгВ≠гГЉгБѓзТ∞еҐГе§ЙжХ∞гБЛгВЙеПЦеЊЧ
openai.api_key = os.getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY")

# --- гГ°гГҐ ---
# 1. гВ®гГ≥гВњгГЉгВ≠гГЉгБІйМ≤йЯ≥зµВдЇЖгАБжЬАе§І60зІТгБЊгБІйМ≤йЯ≥
# 2. йМ≤йЯ≥еЊМгАБгГОгВ§гВЇгГ™гГАгВѓгВЈгГІгГ≥пЉЛйЯ≥йЗПж≠£и¶ПеМЦгВТиЗ™еЛХеЃЯи°М
# 3. Whisper APIгБІжЧ•жЬђи™ЮжЦЗе≠ЧиµЈгБУгБЧ
# 4. дЄАжЩВгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгБѓиЗ™еЛХеЙКйЩ§

def record_and_process_audio(max_duration=60, sample_rate=16000):
    print(f"йМ≤йЯ≥йЦЛеІЛ: жЬАе§І{max_duration}зІТгАБгВ®гГ≥гВњгГЉгВ≠гГЉгБІзµВдЇЖ")
    recording = []
    event = threading.Event()
    start_time = time.time()

    def callback(indata, frames, t, status):
        if time.time() - start_time > max_duration:
            event.set()
            raise sd.CallbackAbort
        recording.append(indata.copy())

    def record_thread():
        with sd.InputStream(samplerate=sample_rate, channels=1, callback=callback):
            event.wait()

    def key_thread():
        input()  # гВ®гГ≥гВњгГЉгВ≠гГЉеЊЕгБ°
        event.set()

    t1 = threading.Thread(target=record_thread)
    t2 = threading.Thread(target=key_thread)
    t1.start()
    t2.start()
    t2.join(timeout=max_duration)
    t1.join(timeout=1)

    if not recording:
        return None

    audio_np = np.concatenate(recording, axis=0).flatten()

    # дЄАжЩВгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгБЂдњЭе≠Ш
    temp_wav = tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(suffix='.wav', delete=False)
    write(temp_wav.name, sample_rate, audio_np)

    # гГОгВ§гВЇйЩ§еОїгГїйЯ≥йЗПж≠£и¶ПеМЦеЗ¶зРЖ
    y, sr = librosa.load(temp_wav.name, sr=sample_rate)
    noise_sample = y[:int(sr*0.5)]  # жЬАеИЭгБЃ0.5зІТгВТгГОгВ§гВЇгБ®дїЃеЃЪ
    y_denoised = nr.reduce_noise(y=y, y_noise=noise_sample, sr=sr, stationary=False)
    y_normalized = librosa.util.normalize(y_denoised)

    # еЗ¶зРЖеЊМгБЃйЯ≥е£∞гВТеИ•гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгБЂдњЭе≠Ш
    processed_wav = tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(suffix='_processed.wav', delete=False)
    sf.write(processed_wav.name, y_normalized, sr)

    # еЕГгБЃйМ≤йЯ≥гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгБѓеЙКйЩ§
    temp_wav.close()
    os.unlink(temp_wav.name)

    return processed_wav.name

def transcribe_with_whisper(audio_path):
    with open(audio_path, "rb") as f:
        transcript = openai.audio.transcriptions.create(
            model="whisper-1",
            file=f,
            language="ja",
            response_format="text"
        )
    return transcript

if __name__ == '__main__':
    wav_path = record_and_process_audio(max_duration=60)
    if wav_path:
        print("йМ≤йЯ≥гГїеЙНеЗ¶зРЖеЃМдЇЖгАБWhisperгБІжЦЗе≠ЧиµЈгБУгБЧдЄ≠...")
        text = transcribe_with_whisper(wav_path)
        print("и™Ни≠ШзµРжЮЬ:")
        print(text)
        os.unlink(wav_path)  # еЗ¶зРЖеЊМгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂеЙКйЩ§
    else:
        print("йМ≤йЯ≥гБМгВ≠гГ£гГ≥гВїгГЂгБХгВМгБЊгБЧгБЯгАБгБЊгБЯгБѓйЯ≥е£∞гБМгБВгВКгБЊгБЫгВУгБІгБЧгБЯгАВ")

# ====================== END OF: src\realtime_whisper.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: src\sandbox_executor.py ====================
# гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂеРН: sandbox_executor.py
# гГ°гГҐ:
# - run_code_in_sandbox()гВТеСЉгБ≥еЗЇгБЧгАБж®ЩжЇЦеЗЇеКЫгГїж®ЩжЇЦгВ®гГ©гГЉгГїеЗЇеКЫгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгВТињФгБЩ
# - гВ®гГ©гГЉгГїгВњгВ§гГ†гВҐгВ¶гГИгВВеИ§еЃЪгБЧгВДгБЩгБД
# - opencodeinterpreter_webui.pyз≠ЙгБЛгВЙimportгБЧгБ¶дљњгБЖ

from sandbox_runner import run_code_in_sandbox

def execute_code_and_return_output(
    code,
    jupyter_state=None,      # дЇТжПЫжАІгБЃгБЯгВБжЃЛгБЧгБ¶гБДгВЛгБМжЬ™дљњзФ®
    lang="python",
    input_files=None,
    output_files=None,
    timeout=10,
    cpu="0.5",
    memory="256m"
):
    """
    гВµгГ≥гГЙгГЬгГГгВѓгВєгБІгВ≥гГЉгГЙгВТеЃЯи°МгБЧгАБзµРжЮЬгГїгВ®гГ©гГЉгГїеЗЇеКЫгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгВТињФгБЩ
    """
    try:
        stdout, stderr, returncode, outputs = run_code_in_sandbox(
            code=code,
            lang=lang,
            input_files=input_files,
            output_files=output_files,
            timeout=timeout,
            cpu=cpu,
            memory=memory
        )
        if returncode == 0:
            return stdout, "OK", outputs
        elif stderr == "Timeout":
            return "Timeout", "Timeout", outputs
        else:
            return stderr, "Error", outputs
    except Exception as e:
        return str(e), "Error", {}

# ====================== END OF: src\sandbox_executor.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: src\streamlit_legacy.py ====================
import streamlit as st
from openai import OpenAI
from dotenv import load_dotenv
import os
import io

# йЯ≥е£∞йМ≤йЯ≥зФ®
from streamlit_mic_recorder import mic_recorder

# .envгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгБЛгВЙAPIгВ≠гГЉгВТи™≠гБњиЊЉгВА
load_dotenv()
api_key = os.getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY")
client = OpenAI(api_key=api_key)

st.title("ChatGPTйҐ®гГБгГ£гГГгГИпЉЛйЯ≥е£∞еЕ•еКЫпЉЛгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгВҐгГГгГЧгГ≠гГЉгГЙ")

# гВїгГГгВЈгГІгГ≥гВєгГЖгГЉгГИгБІгГБгГ£гГГгГИе±•ж≠ігВТзЃ°зРЖ
if "messages" not in st.session_state:
    st.session_state.messages = []

# гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгВҐгГГгГЧгГ≠гГЉгГЙ
uploaded_files = st.file_uploader("гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгВТгВҐгГГгГЧгГ≠гГЉгГЙпЉИи§ЗжХ∞еПѓпЉЙ", accept_multiple_files=True)
if uploaded_files:
    for file in uploaded_files:
        st.write(f"гВҐгГГгГЧгГ≠гГЉгГЙ: {file.name}")
        # гГЖгВ≠гВєгГИгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгБѓеЖЕеЃєи°®з§Ї
        if file.type.startswith("text"):
            content = file.read().decode("utf-8", errors="ignore")
            st.text_area(f"{file.name}гБЃеЖЕеЃє", content, height=100)
        # гГРгВ§гГКгГ™гБЃе†іеРИгБѓгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂеРНгБЃгБњи°®з§Ї

# йЯ≥е£∞еЕ•еКЫпЉИйМ≤йЯ≥пЉЙ
st.subheader("йЯ≥е£∞еЕ•еКЫпЉИйМ≤йЯ≥вЖТWhisperгБІжЦЗе≠ЧиµЈгБУгБЧпЉЙ")
audio_data = mic_recorder(
    start_prompt="йМ≤йЯ≥йЦЛеІЛ",
    stop_prompt="йМ≤йЯ≥еБЬж≠Ґ",
    format="webm",
    key="mic"
)

if audio_data:
    st.audio(audio_data["bytes"], format="audio/webm")
    audio_bytes_io = io.BytesIO(audio_data["bytes"])
    audio_bytes_io.name = "audio.webm"
    try:
        transcript = client.audio.transcriptions.create(
            model="whisper-1",
            file=audio_bytes_io,
            language="ja"
        )
        st.success("жЦЗе≠ЧиµЈгБУгБЧзµРжЮЬ:")
        st.write(transcript.text)
        # жЦЗе≠ЧиµЈгБУгБЧзµРжЮЬгВТгГБгГ£гГГгГИе±•ж≠ігБЂињљеК†
        st.session_state.messages.append({"role": "user", "content": transcript.text})
    except Exception as e:
        st.error(f"жЦЗе≠ЧиµЈгБУгБЧгВ®гГ©гГЉ: {e}")

# гГБгГ£гГГгГИе±•ж≠ігБЃи°®з§Ї
for message in st.session_state.messages:
    with st.chat_message(message["role"]):
        st.markdown(message["content"])

# гГ¶гГЉгВґгГЉгБЛгВЙгБЃеЕ•еКЫеПЧдїШ
if prompt := st.chat_input("гГ°гГГгВїгГЉгВЄгВТеЕ•еКЫгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБД"):
    st.session_state.messages.append({"role": "user", "content": prompt})
    with st.chat_message("user"):
        st.markdown(prompt)

    # OpenAI APIгБІAIењЬз≠ФгВТгВєгГИгГ™гГЉгГЯгГ≥гВ∞зФЯжИР
    response = client.chat.completions.create(
        model="gpt-4o-mini",
        messages=[
            {"role": "system", "content": "гБВгБ™гБЯгБѓжЬЙиГљгБ™гВҐгВЈгВєгВњгГ≥гГИгБІгБЩгАВ"},
            *st.session_state.messages
        ],
        stream=True
    )

    with st.chat_message("assistant"):
        full_response = ""
        placeholder = st.empty()
        for chunk in response:
            content = getattr(chunk.choices[0].delta, "content", None)
            if content:
                full_response += content
                placeholder.markdown(full_response + "вЦМ")
        placeholder.markdown(full_response)

    st.session_state.messages.append({"role": "assistant", "content": full_response})

# ====================== END OF: src\streamlit_legacy.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: src\dev_tools\test_manager.py ====================
# test_manager.py
import os
import sys
from dotenv import load_dotenv

# зТ∞еҐГе§ЙжХ∞и™≠гБњиЊЉгБњ
load_dotenv()
api_key = os.getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY")

# гГҐгВЄгГ•гГЉгГЂгГСгВєгВТињљеК†пЉИsrcйЕНдЄЛгВТжШОз§ЇпЉЙ
BASE_DIR = os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(__file__))  # src/
sys.path.append(BASE_DIR)
sys.path.append(os.path.join(BASE_DIR, "modules"))

# гГҐгВЄгГ•гГЉгГЂгВ§гГ≥гГЭгГЉгГИпЉИдЊЛпЉЙ
try:
    from whisper_handler import transcribe_audio
    from code_generator import generate_code_from_text
    from tester import save_and_test_code
    from diff_viewer import generate_diff
except ImportError as e:
    print(f"вЭМ гГҐгВЄгГ•гГЉгГЂгБЃи™≠гБњиЊЉгБњгБЂе§±жХЧгБЧгБЊгБЧгБЯ: {e}")
    sys.exit(1)

# гГЖгВєгГИйЦҐжХ∞
def run_all_tests(audio_path=None, transcript_text=None):
    if not api_key:
        print("вЭМ .envгБЂOPENAI_API_KEYгБМеЃЪзЊ©гБХгВМгБ¶гБДгБЊгБЫгВУгАВ")
        return

    print("вЬЕ OpenCodeInterpreter гГЖгВєгГИйЦЛеІЛ\n")

    if audio_path:
        print(f"рЯО§ йЯ≥е£∞гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂжЦЗе≠ЧиµЈгБУгБЧ: {audio_path}")
        transcript = transcribe_audio(audio_path)
    elif transcript_text:
        print(f"рЯУЭ жМЗеЃЪгБХгВМгБЯгГЖгВ≠гВєгГИгБЛгВЙгВ≥гГЉгГЙзФЯжИРпЉЪ{transcript_text}")
        transcript = transcript_text
    else:
        print("вЪ†пЄП йЯ≥е£∞гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгБЊгБЯгБѓгГЖгВ≠гВєгГИгВТжМЗеЃЪгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБДгАВ")
        return

    print("\nрЯІ† GPTгВ≥гГЉгГЙзФЯжИРдЄ≠...")
    code = generate_code_from_text(transcript)
    print("\n" + code)

    print("\nрЯІ™ гГЖгВєгГИеЃЯи°МдЄ≠...")
    result = save_and_test_code(code)
    print("\n" + result)

    print("\nрЯФН еЈЃеИЖи°®з§Ї...")
    diff = generate_diff("", code)
    print(diff)

    print("\nвЬЕ гГЖгВєгГИеЃМдЇЖ")

# еЃЯи°МдЊЛпЉИдїїжДПгБЃйЯ≥е£∞ or гГЖгВ≠гВєгГИгБІеИЗгВКжЫњгБИпЉЙ
if __name__ == "__main__":
    # audio_path = os.path.join(BASE_DIR, "sandbox_output", "sample_audio.wav")
    audio_path = None  # йЯ≥е£∞гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгБМгБ™гБДе†іеРИгБѓ None
    transcript_text = "еБґжХ∞гБЛе•ЗжХ∞гБЛгВТеИ§еЃЪгБЩгВЛPythonйЦҐжХ∞гВТдљЬжИРгБЧгБ¶"

    run_all_tests(audio_path, transcript_text)

# ====================== END OF: src\dev_tools\test_manager.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: src\nexuscore\agents\architect_agent.py ====================
# ==============================================================================
# гГХгВ©гГЂгГА: src/nexuscore/agents/
# гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂеРН: architect_agent.py (гГ™гГХгВ°гВѓгВњгГ™гГ≥гВ∞зЙИ)
# гГ°гГҐ: жЦ∞гБЧгБДBaseAgentгБЂжЇЦжЛ†гБЩгВЛгВИгБЖгГ™гГХгВ°гВѓгВњгГ™гГ≥гВ∞гАВ
#      - __init__гВТжШОз§ЇзЪДгБЂеСЉгБ≥еЗЇгБЩгВИгБЖгБЂе§ЙжЫігАВ
#      - LLMеСЉгБ≥еЗЇгБЧгВТexecute_llm_taskгГ°гВљгГГгГЙгБЂзµ±дЄАгАВ
# ==============================================================================
from .base_agent import BaseAgent

class ArchitectAgent(BaseAgent):
    SYSTEM_PROMPT = """
гБВгБ™гБЯгБѓгАБгГЩгВєгГИгГЧгГ©гВѓгГЖгВ£гВєгБЂз≤ЊйАЪгБЧгБЯгВЈгГЛгВҐгВљгГХгГИгВ¶гВІгВҐгВҐгГЉгВ≠гГЖгВѓгГИгБІгБЩгАВ
гГ¶гГЉгВґгГЉгБЃйЂШгГђгГЩгГЂгБ™и¶Бж±ВгВТиІ£йЗИгБЧгАБе†ЕзЙҐгБІгВєгВ±гГЉгГ©гГЦгГЂгБ™гГЧгГ≠гВЄгВІгВѓгГИгБЃеЃМеЕ®гБ™гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂжІЛйА†гБ®гАБ
еРДгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгБЃгВєгВ±гГЂгГИгГ≥гВ≥гГЉгГЙпЉИй™®ж†ЉпЉЙгАБгБЭгБЧгБ¶дЊЭе≠ШйЦҐдњВгВТеЃЪзЊ©гБЩгВЛJSONгВТеЗЇеКЫгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБДгАВ
"""
    # вШЕвШЕвШЕвШЕвШЕ гБУгБУгБЛгВЙгБМжЬАйЗНи¶БдњЃж≠£зВє (1/2) вШЕвШЕвШЕвШЕвШЕ
    def __init__(self):
        """
        ArchitectAgentгВТеИЭжЬЯеМЦгБЩгВЛгАВ
        жЦ∞гБЧгБДBaseAgentгБЃ__init__гВТеСЉгБ≥еЗЇгБЩгБУгБ®гБІгАБLLMRouterгБМиЗ™еЛХзЪДгБЂгВїгГГгГИгВҐгГГгГЧгБХгВМгВЛгАВ
        """
        super().__init__()
    # вШЕвШЕвШЕвШЕвШЕ гБУгБУгБЊгБІ вШЕвШЕвШЕвШЕвШЕ

    def design_project_structure(self, user_requirement: str) -> str:
        prompt = f"""
дї•дЄЛгБЃгГ¶гГЉгВґгГЉи¶Бж±ВгВТжЇАгБЯгБЩгБЯгВБгБЃгАБеЃМеЕ®гБ™гГЧгГ≠гВЄгВІгВѓгГИжІЛйА†гВТи®≠и®ИгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБДгАВ

# гГ¶гГЉгВґгГЉи¶Бж±В
{user_requirement}

# еЗЇеКЫи¶Бдїґ
- гГЂгГЉгГИгБѓеНШдЄАгБЃ `project` гВ™гГЦгВЄгВІгВѓгГИгБ®гБЧгБЊгБЩгАВ
- гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂжІЛйА†гБѓ `files` йЕНеИЧгБІгАБгГНгВєгГИгБХгВМгБЯгВ™гГЦгВЄгВІгВѓгГИгБ®гБЧгБ¶и°®зПЊгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБДгАВ
- еРДгГХгВ°гВ§гГЂгВ™гГЦгВЄгВІгВѓгГИгБѓ `name` (гГЗгВ£гГђгВѓгГИгГ™гВТеРЂгВАгГХгГЂгГСгВє), `type` ('folder' or 'file'), `content` (гВєгВ±гГЂгГИгГ≥гВ≥гГЉгГЙ) гБЃгВ≠гГЉгВТжМБгБ§ењЕи¶БгБМгБВгВКгБЊгБЩгАВ
- `content`гБЂгБѓгАБгВѓгГ©гВєеЃЪзЊ©гАБйЦҐжХ∞гВЈгВ∞гГНгГБгГ£гАБдЄїи¶БгБ™гГ≠гВЄгГГгВѓгВТTODOгВ≥гГ°гГ≥гГИгБ®гБЧгБ¶и®Шињ∞гБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБДгАВ
- ењЕи¶БгБ™гГ©гВ§гГЦгГ©гГ™гБѓ `requirements.txt` гБЂеРЂгВБгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБДгАВ
- ењЕгБЪJSONељҐеЉПгБІеЗЇеКЫгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБДгАВ

# JSONеЗЇеКЫдЊЛ
{{
  "project": {{
    "files": [
      {{
        "name": "app/",
        "type": "folder",
        "content": ""
      }},
      {{
        "name": "app/main.py",
        "type": "file",
        "content": "# TODO: Flask app initialization\\n\\ndef main():\\n    pass"
      }},
      {{
        "name": "requirements.txt",
        "type": "file",
        "content": "flask\\nsqlalchemy"
      }}
    ]
  }}
}}
"""
        # вШЕвШЕвШЕвШЕвШЕ гБУгБУгБЛгВЙгБМжЬАйЗНи¶БдњЃж≠£зВє (2/2) вШЕвШЕвШЕвШЕвШЕ
        # еП§гБД_call_llmгБЛгВЙгАБжЦ∞гБЧгБДexecute_llm_taskгГ°гВљгГГгГЙгБЂе§ЙжЫі
        # гБУгВМгБЂгВИгВКгАБгБУгБЃгВњгВєгВѓгБЂжЬАйБ©гБ™LLMгБМLLMRouterгБЂгВИгБ£гБ¶иЗ™еЛХгБІйБЄжКЮгБХгВМгВЛ
        return self.execute_llm_task(prompt, as_json=True)
        # вШЕвШЕвШЕвШЕвШЕ гБУгБУгБЊгБІ вШЕвШЕвШЕвШЕвШЕ

# ====================== END OF: src\nexuscore\agents\architect_agent.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: src\nexuscore\agents\base_agent.py ====================
# ==============================================================================
# гГХгВ°гВ§гГЂ: src/nexuscore/agents/base_agent.py
# зЫЃзЪД  : гБЩгБєгБ¶гБЃ Agent гБЃ LLM еСЉгБ≥еЗЇгБЧеЯЇзЫ§гАВllm_router зµМзФ±гБІгГҐгГЗгГЂйБЄжКЮгАВ
# гГЭгВ§гГ≥гГИ:
#   - as_json=True гБЃгБ®гБНгАБsystem гБЂгАМJSONгБЃгБњгАНгВђгГЉгГЙжЦЗгВТиЗ™еЛХдїШдЄОпЉИдЄ≠е§ЃйЫЖж®©пЉЙ
#   - йНµеД™еЕИеЇ¶: зТ∞еҐГе§ЙжХ∞ > .env > secrets.pyпЉИ.env гБѓиµЈеЛХжЩВгБЂзТ∞еҐГгБЄгГ≠гГЉгГЙпЉЙ
#   - llm_router гБМзД°гБД/е§±жХЧжЩВгБЃгГХгВ©гГЉгГЂгГРгГГгВѓгВТеЖЕиФµ
# дЊЭе≠Ш  : src/nexuscore/llm/llm_router.py
# ==============================================================================
from __future__ import annotations

import os
import logging
from typing import Optional
